title: Real email composition
description: Full business email — greeting, body, signoff at speed
text: Hi Sarah, thank you for the update on the Q3 roadmap. I reviewed the projections and they look solid. One question: can we shift the marketing launch to mid-August? That would give the engineering team an extra week. Looking forward to your reply. Best, Alex.
tips: Average professional writes 30+ emails a day
Email rhythm = quick greeting + body + signoff — practice all three
Commas in greetings/signoffs are habits — train muscle memory

character_tips.anna: Emails are the heartbeat of work. Train them = win every workday.
character_tips.maxim: 30+ emails/day average. Master this rhythm = save hours weekly.
character_tips.knopych: INBOX ATTACK! ⚔️ Type emails like a samurai!
character_tips.klavochka: Polite, clear, friendly — like a good letter, my dear ✉️
